typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' - Classic Serif for marketing headings to establish authority, paired with Geometric Sans for body and dashboards for modern precision.

headings.usage: Marketing page heroes, section titles, testimonial quotes. MUST NOT use for dense dashboard data.

body.usage: Body text, dashboard UI, form labels, buttons.

colors.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Luxury (White, Deep Navy, Gold)
rules: No generic full-screen gradients. Use solid colors with noise texture if needed.
Gold accent must be used sparingly for high-value CTA buttons, badges, and active states.
Never use pure black or grey. Greys must be tinted with blue (slate/navy).

visual_enhancers.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-slate-950/70 (dark). 1px delicate inner stroke.
visual_enhancers.borders: Dashboard cards use 1px solid border (border-border). Pricing cards can use subtle glowing borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient diffused shadow. shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] for light mode cards.

component_name.strategy: Shadcn for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Dashboards), Raw HTML+Tailwind for Marketing layout.

customizations.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary button: Navy bg (Light mode) or White bg (Dark mode) with Gold hover state.
customizations.inputs: Shadcn standard but with rounded-xl, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent_gold.
customizations.tabs: Override h-9 to h-auto. Smooth sliding indicator.
customizations.toasts: Use Sonner component for all notifications.

forbidden: Card components for creative marketing sections

grids.marketing_page: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical layout, gap-8 to gap-12.
grids.dashboards: High Density Grid Mode B. gap-4 to gap-6. Direct children must stretch.

layouts.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-12 for containers. Padding inside border containers is mandatory.

marketing_page.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 max opacity for hero images.
marketing_page.visual_tension: Never center everything. Use asymmetrical alignment and overlapping sections.

dashboards.cards: Subtle roundness (rounded-2xl). Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds subtle shadow and lift.
dashboards.sidebar: Minimalist, icon-heavy with text, active state highlighted with Gold left-border or Gold tint.

motion.general: Use Framer Motion. Smooth page transitions. Hover states must explicitly change text color if background changes.
motion.accessibility: Ensure accessibility preference for reduced motion.
motion.micro_interactions: Subtle lift (-translate-y-1) on dashboard cards on hover.

accessibility.contrast: APCA preferred. Normal text min 4.5:1. Never rely on color alone for states.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have HIGHER contrast than default state.

3d_libraries.decision: Not mandatory for MVP, but React Spring Parallax can be used for 2.5D storytelling on the marketing page.
3d_libraries.recommendation: Use Framer Motion 3D for simple 3D transitions (e.g., spinning a pricing card) if required.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Implement light and dark mode comprehensively.
Ensure the booking flow and auth pages match the premium visual language.
For .js files, stick to React best practices for standard JS (since .tsx is not used, skip TypeScript typings).
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or any surface with content underneath.
General UI/UX design guidelines fully apply. Test IDs must be added rigorously.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the standard mold—use layered z-index depth, generous paddings, and asymmetrical marketing grids.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
NEVER center-align the main App container. No `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions). Do NOT use `transition: all`.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for marketing and Lucide (lucide-react) for dashboards.
Always use Sonner for toasts. They are at /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js
Use the provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
Add data-testid to every button, input, and important link.
